title: The Zombie Desert
lines: You stumble out onto shifting, orange sand. The sky is a bruised, eternal twilight.
You turn around to look at the door, but there is nothing but sand behind you. The wooden portal has vanished into thin air.
In the distance, you see a lone silhouette stumbling across a dune. You are no longer in the village.
Your adventure in the desert has begun.

options.desc: 1. Venture deeper into the orange sands
2. Pause and listen to the haunting desert wind
3. Dig a shallow pit in the sand to rest (Wait for night)
